emails.body:
James,

Can you sanity check something for me before I take it any further?

I was looking at the ATaS congressional deck you sent over and slide 14 does not look like it belongs in the same distribution as the rest of the brief. I am copying the security office mailbox because I may be over-reading the footer, but I have not forwarded the deck beyond this note.

If this is just a stale template artifact, tell me and I will stop worrying about it.

- Stix

Stix,

I am still catching up from travel and do not have the deck open in front of me. Please do not circulate it until we know exactly what you are looking at.

Slide 14 has been reworked a few times, so it may be an appendix slide that should have been stripped before the congressional version went out. I will check the v13 file when I am back online.

James

LCDR Martinez,

We reviewed the slide you flagged. The attached presentation appears to include one embedded slide with a SECRET//NOFORN marking. Do not forward, print, upload, or discuss the contents of that slide over unclassified email.

Please preserve the original message, identify everyone who received the attachment, and provide the sender, timestamp, and any recall or deletion actions already attempted. Treat this as suspected data spillage until Security provides disposition instructions.

This email is unclassified and intentionally does not reproduce the slide content.

JIAITF Security Office

James,

Security says the slide I flagged has a marking issue. For clarity, this is the deck you sent me Thursday night for a quick look before the congressional prep push. I opened it, saw the footer on slide 14, and stopped there.

I have not forwarded the file to anyone else. I can delete my local copy once Security tells me to, but they asked that I preserve the original message for now.

If this came from the Abreu prep package, somebody needs to get in front of it before Monday morning.

Stix

Stix,

Delete that attachment from your mailbox and downloads folder, please. I am attaching the same v13 deck here so there is no confusion about which file I mean.

I tried Outlook recall on the Thursday message, but it did not give me a clean confirmation. I am going to keep this quiet until I can sort out whether the slide was actually visible in the version COL Abreu has. We are inside the 0900 prep window and I do not want to create a fire drill if this is only in the copy I sent you.

James
